item.title: UK Transport - Part 1
item.author: Author
item.description: Introduction : Never try Python, never try an API, want to try e-ink screen so let’s go ! But what can I do to start, let’s go DuckDuckGo with the words “Free API” and Transport API, well great, live data, large amount of data and I know a friend living in UK who’s always late so this project can help (well, was late because now, remote working) and have an 3D printer so I can make a surprise so… Let’s go for a proto !
